title: [Origin Realms] Themed Spirit Skins ADDON
description: Adds new textures to the [Origin Realms] SPIRIT SKINS resourcepack
body:
This resource pack is an addon for [[Origin Realms] SPIRIT SKINS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/originrealms-spiritskins) (you need that pack for this one to work)

**Always use the most recent version to avoid any bugs**

This pack replaces the texture's from the original pack for new ones made after the tool skins themes (like rainbow for clover tools, ice for festive tools, etc)

This resource pack needs [ServerPackUnlocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker) and [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) just like the original

Original concept for this addon and some textures made by **P0LYHIST0R**
